summary: Resume archive game inning markers - Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a user has Hide Spoilers ON
AND a user has exited an archive game

steps.action: WHEN a user resumes an archive game
steps.result:
THEN the video starts playing from the bookmarked point
AND inning markers display in the scrubber, to the left of the playback head, for the portion of the game the user has already watched
AND as the half innings begin, inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar to the left of the playhead
AND inning markers are not populated between the users watch point and the end of the game, to the right of the playback head
